benefits.description: Noticed difference in hair after adding supplements and hair serum alongside GHK-cu injections; did not notice hair difference from GHK-cu alone

protocol_notes: Has been cycling GHK-cu injections for over a year. Did not notice hair improvement until adding minoxidil, pumpkin seed oil, saw palmetto (DHT blockers), and a growth-promoting hair serum (Cecred or The Ordinary). Recommends these adjuncts for hair loss.
